info.title: QR Design Studio Public API
info.description: QR Design Studio currently exposes no public executable REST API. This document exists for honest agent discovery and will list only documented, safe public APIs if they are added later.

x-agent-safety.excluded: No auth, profile, dashboard, dynamic redirect, analytics, Firebase, payment, checkout, upload, or mutation APIs are advertised.
instructions: Use public pages and Markdown fallbacks for discovery.
Do not submit forms, upload CSV files, export generated files, or mutate the user's local design state automatically.
Do not send QR payloads, uploaded logos, filenames, WiFi passwords, vCard fields, or other user-provided content to external services without explicit user approval.
